models.label: ChatGPT (free version)
models.risk_description: Your data may be used to train the model
models.notes: Free version = your conversations train the model. Disable 'Chat history & training' to limit.

models.label: ChatGPT Plus (paid subscription)
models.risk_description: Training disableable, but data stored in the US
models.notes: Disable 'Improve the model for everyone' in settings. Data stored on US servers.

models.label: ChatGPT Enterprise / Team
models.risk_description: No retention, no training — enterprise contract
models.notes: Enterprise version with DPA (Data Processing Agreement). Data not used for training.

models.label: Claude (Sonnet / Opus)
models.notes: Anthropic does not use API data for training. Chat version may retain 30 days.

models.label: Google Gemini (free version)
models.risk_description: Your data trains the model by default
models.notes: Disable 'Activity' in Google settings. Free version = training by default.

models.label: Gemini for Google Workspace
models.risk_description: No training, but data transits through the US
models.notes: Workspace Business/Enterprise version — no training on your data. DPA available.

models.label: Mistral AI (API)
models.risk_description: European hosting, no training on API data
models.notes: French company, data hosted in the EU. API does not use your data for training. GDPR compliant.

models.label: Le Chat (Mistral)
models.risk_description: Chat version = training by default, disableable
models.notes: Mistral's chat interface. Disable training in settings. EU hosting.

models.label: DeepSeek
models.risk_description: Data subject to Chinese data security legislation
models.notes: Chinese company. Data may be subject to Chinese authorities. Avoid for any sensitive data.

models.label: Qwen (Alibaba)
models.notes: Alibaba model. Similar risks to DeepSeek. Avoid for sensitive data.

models.label: Kimi / Moonshot
models.notes: Chinese model. Similar confidentiality risks to other Chinese models.

models.label: GLM (Zhipu AI / Z.ai)
models.notes: Chinese model (Zhipu AI). Same confidentiality risks as DeepSeek and Qwen.

models.label: Ollama Cloud
models.notes: Ollama Cloud does not accumulate your data but servers are in the US. Good compromise for medium-sensitivity data.

models.label: Ollama Local (on your machine)
models.risk_description: No risk — data never leaves your machine
models.notes: Model executed locally. No data sent to the internet. Recommended for all sensitive documents.

models.label: llama.cpp Local
models.notes: Local execution with llama.cpp. No data transmitted. Perfect for critical documents.

models.label: Azure OpenAI
models.notes: Azure OpenAI with EU region (France, Netherlands). DPA available. Good choice for GDPR-sensitive businesses.

models.label: AWS Bedrock
models.notes: AWS Bedrock with EU region (Frankfurt, Ireland). No training on your data. DPA available.
